title: ENDPOINT_COUNTER test not isolated from parallel tests
description: connect_with_failover_increments_counter (client.rs lines 328-339) reads ENDPOINT_COUNTER before and after a single call and asserts after == before + 1. ENDPOINT_COUNTER is a static AtomicUsize shared across all tests in the crate. Rust test harness runs unit tests in parallel by default. A concurrent test that also calls connect_with_failover would increment the counter, making after == before + 2 (or more) and causing a spurious failure. The test needs either: (a) #[serial] attribute (requires serial_test crate), (b) a per-call counter design, or (c) change the assertion to after > before.
